constraints.layout_style: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs
Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root
At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element
Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers

reference_templates.title: Submit outside form
reference_templates.notes: Submit button outside form linked via form= attribute

reference_templates.notes: Years of experience number input with min/max constraints

reference_templates.title: Ashby yes no buttons

reference_templates.dom_excerpt:
Ashby yes no

Are you authorized to work in this country?

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Yes/no question as paired button elements, not native radio inputs Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: Phone split into country code select and local number input in separate wrappers Reference DOM (Submit outside form): Submit button outside form linked via form= attribute Reference DOM (Number min max experience): Years of experience number input with min/max constraints Reference DOM (Ashby yes no buttons): Ashby-inspired yes/no as two styled buttons instead of native radio Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: pill-yes-no, shadow-host, aria-label-only, div-role-textbox, split-phone. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Submit outside form; Number min max experience; Ashby yes no buttons.
